requirements.notes: A completed external audit report and issue-linked remediation status are not yet retained.

Public beta remains blocked on the remaining missing evidence rows.

operator_notes: This committed baseline is intentionally blocked. It tracks the evidence categories required before public beta or production release without storing private RPC URLs, credentials, signing material, or unreleased drop payloads.
